personality_one_liner: A sharp, official, and highly professional construction quote utility that instills confidence and legal compliance.

spacing.rule: Use iOS-native generous vertical spacing. Use md/lg for internal card padding, and xl for section separations. Thumb zone CTA MUST be sticky at bottom.

do's: Use glassmorphism for the bottom tab bar.
Use glassmorphism for sticky action button containers at the bottom of scrolling forms.
Use glassmorphism on the sticky header when scrolling down long itemized lists.
dont's: Do not use glassmorphism on standard form inputs or list cards.
Do not over-blur the line item data.

screens.name: Orçamentos (Home/List)
screens.purpose: View past quotes history, segmented by Draft/Sent/Accepted.

states.empty: Illustration of a blank clipboard. Text: 'Nenhum orçamento criado'. Primary CTA: 'Criar Novo Orçamento'.
states.error: Text: 'Erro ao carregar lista.' with Retry button.

screens.layout: Header: Title 'Orçamentos'. Top: Segmented control (Rascunho, Enviado, Aceite). Body: Scrollable list of cards. Each card displays Client Name, Quote Number (e.g. 2026001), Date, Status Badge, and Total Value (€). Use single column layout (width 100% minus padding).

screens.name: Criar Orçamento (Create Form)
screens.purpose: A guided, phone-first workflow to draft a professional quote without spreadsheet friction.

states.empty: N/A - this is a form screen.

screens.layout: Single scrollable form. Sticky bottom action bar ('Guardar & Pré-visualizar') layered with glass. Section 1: Client Info (Name, NIF, Address). Section 2: Seguros/Sinistro Info (optional). Section 3: Line Items. DO NOT use horizontal scrolling tables. Display each line item as a vertical card (Name, Qty x Unit, Unit Price, Line Total). Add Item button opens a bottom sheet to input item details. Section 4: Observations. Footer: Auto-calculated Subtotal, IVA, Total.

screens.name: Line Item Detail (Bottom Sheet)
screens.purpose: Input individual work items quickly via a half-screen modal.
screens.layout: Presented via @gorhom/bottom-sheet. Inputs: Descrição (Text), Quantidade (Numeric), Unidade (M2, ML, UN, etc), Preço Unitário (Numeric), IVA % (Dropdown/Segment). Sticky 'Adicionar' button at bottom of sheet.

screens.name: Preview & Partilhar
screens.purpose: Final visual check of the quote and actions to generate PDF or Share.
screens.layout: Visual representation of the physical 'Orçamento' document. Sticky bottom FAB or full-width action bar with two buttons: 'Partilhar PDF' (WhatsApp/Email icon) and 'Aprovar Orçamento'. PDF Layout specs: Logo top left, company details top right. 'ORÇAMENTO PARA CLIENTE / SEGURO' title block. Client info box. Table format for items. Totals at bottom. Acceptance signature block.

screens.name: Definições
screens.purpose: Manage the fixed company template data.
screens.layout: iOS grouped list style. Pre-filled with: António Virgílio Marques Barros, NIF 195060822, Address Eira Velha 1 Valença, Tel 930582585, Email construcoesbarros.valenca@gmail.com. Toggle for default IVA rate.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the '1 iOS-Native Clean' personality. The app must feel like an official, trustworthy enterprise utility, not a playful or generic web app.

Logo Requirement: You MUST include the user-uploaded Construções Barros logo in the app header and PDF template. The visual is described as: 'yellow houses with crossed hammer/wrench, blue CONSTRUÇÕES BARROS ribbon'.

PDF Generation: Utilize `expo-print` and `expo-sharing` to generate and share the PDF. The PDF HTML layout must closely mirror the user's existing formal document (table-based items, company header, signature block).

Line Item UX: For the mobile screen, do NOT build a horizontally scrolling table/spreadsheet for line items. Use vertical stacked cards (Name, Qty x Unit @ Price). Use a bottom sheet to add/edit items.

Sticky Actions: On the Create Quote screen, the 'Preview & Save' button MUST be fixed to the bottom of the screen (above safe area) using a glassmorphism container, so the user doesn't have to scroll past 20 items to save.

Dark Mode: Implement standard iOS dark mode using Slate 900 for surface, Slate 800 for cards, and light text. Ensure the brand blue (1E40AF) still pops or adjust to a slightly lighter blue variant for accessibility in dark mode if needed.
Typography: Use Plus Jakarta Sans for all UI elements. Use a monospaced variant (or use `fontVariant: ['tabular-nums']`) for all pricing and quantities to ensure they align properly.
Use Space Grotesk or tabular-nums for quotes IDs (e.g. 2026001).
